windows.embed_text_v2: Decorating a white vessel candle with pink wax hearts, arranging and pressing heart embeds onto warm melted soy wax surface using a wooden skewer, strawberry cloth, ceramic container finishing
windows.summary_v2: Pink heart-shaped wax pieces are arranged and pressed with a skewer onto the warm surface of a white vessel candle to decorate its top.

seconds_v2.desc: A white ceramic vessel candle sits on a table, its pale surface still soft, with several small pink wax hearts placed around the rim as decoration; a strawberry-print cloth holds spare pink hearts at right.
More pink wax hearts have been arranged across the top of the setting candle, ringing the centre; the white vessel has a small label on its side.
The pink hearts are laid out evenly over the candle surface, decorating the still-setting wax in the white container.
Close view of the white candle covered with a layer of pale-pink heart-shaped wax pieces pressed onto the top.
The decorated candle from a slightly higher angle, pink hearts clustered on the surface, another white vessel and wooden lids visible behind.
A wooden skewer/chopstick reaches into the vessel and begins nudging the pink hearts together over the warm wax; a plain white candle and brown-lidded jars sit in the background.
The skewer pushes the pink hearts into a tighter cluster on the candle surface, some hearts starting to soften and merge into the melted top.
The skewer continues arranging the now-clustered pink hearts on the candle's surface, the wax around them glossy and partly melted.

windows.embed_text_v2: Burning a finished white vessel soy candle as a burn test, single flame, widening melt pool, cream wax in white glass jar by window, time-lapse caption, lit candle result
windows.summary_v2: A finished white-vessel candle is lit and burning by a window as a burn test, with an on-screen caption noting time elapsed.

seconds_v2.desc: A finished white-glass vessel candle burns with a single flame on a white table, the wax surface just beginning to pool around the wick; blurred white vessels sit behind.
The lit candle continues burning, flame steady above a shallow melt pool in the cream-colored wax of the white container.
Same candle lit by a window with sheer curtains and greenery outside; a burned-in caption '1.5 hours later' overlays the warm-toned wax surface.
The candle keeps burning with the '1.5 hours later' overlay text; the wax pool has widened slightly across the top.
Lit candle by the window, '1.5 hours later' caption still shown, flame leaning gently, melt pool spreading toward the glass edges.
The burning candle with overlay text, showing a fuller, even melt pool as the burn test progresses.
Close shot of the lit white-vessel candle, flame upright over a wide warm wax pool; a wood-lidded jar is visible behind.
The finished candle continues to burn on the white table, a row of white lidded jars blurred in the background, flame glowing over the melted surface.

windows.summary_v2: Burn-test footage of a finished jar candle's 2nd burn cycle, showing the flame and full melt pool with overlay text.

seconds_v2.desc: Lit cream ceramic jar candle on a windowsill, single tall flame and a small sticky label on the front; warm afternoon light.
Top-down view of the same lit candle in its ceramic vessel, full melt pool of amber wax, yellow caption 'Reached perfect 2nd burn cycle' below the flame.
Same overhead burn-test shot, single flame in the centre of the molten wax pool, '2nd burn cycle' overlay visible.
Overhead view, melt pool extending fully across the candle, flame steady, overlay still on.
Slightly closer overhead, flame burning, melt pool fully liquid edge-to-edge, '2nd burn cycle' text remains.
Even closer overhead, flame dancing, full smooth molten pool, overlay text fading or near edge.
Very close overhead on the flame and its reflection in the molten wax pool, no overlay visible.
Very close shot on the flickering flame above the amber melt pool of the finished test candle.
